# butteraugli public API surface
# Generated by butteraugli/tests/public_api_doc.rs via `cargo public-api --simplified`
# (regenerated on every `cargo test`; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).
# Underscore-prefixed features are internal and excluded from the
# all-features section.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes together with the code.

impl core::fmt::Debug for butteraugli::image::Image3F
pub fn butteraugli::image::Image3F::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::ops::index::Index<usize> for butteraugli::image::Image3F
pub type butteraugli::image::Image3F::Output = butteraugli::image::ImageF
pub fn butteraugli::image::Image3F::index(&self, usize) -> &Self::Output
impl core::ops::index::IndexMut<usize> for butteraugli::image::Image3F
pub fn butteraugli::image::Image3F::index_mut(&mut self, usize) -> &mut Self::Output
impl core::marker::Freeze for butteraugli::image::Image3F

pub struct butteraugli::image::ImageF

pub fn butteraugli::image::ImageF::as_mut_ptr(&mut self) -> *mut f32
pub fn butteraugli::image::ImageF::as_ptr(&self) -> *const f32
pub fn butteraugli::image::ImageF::copy_from(&mut self, &Self)
pub fn butteraugli::image::ImageF::data(&self) -> &[f32]
pub fn butteraugli::image::ImageF::data_mut(&mut self) -> &mut [f32]
pub fn butteraugli::image::ImageF::fill(&mut self, f32)
pub fn butteraugli::image::ImageF::filled(usize, usize, f32) -> Self
pub fn butteraugli::image::ImageF::from_pool_dirty(usize, usize, &butteraugli::image::BufferPool) -> Self
pub fn butteraugli::image::ImageF::from_pool_zeroed(usize, usize, &butteraugli::image::BufferPool) -> Self

pub fn butteraugli::image::ImageF::from_vec_padded(alloc::vec::Vec<f32>, usize, usize, usize) -> Self
pub fn butteraugli::image::ImageF::get(&self, usize, usize) -> f32
pub fn butteraugli::image::ImageF::height(&self) -> usize
pub fn butteraugli::image::ImageF::new(usize, usize) -> Self

pub fn butteraugli::image::ImageF::row_full_mut(&mut self, usize) -> &mut [f32]

pub fn butteraugli::image::ImageF::width(&self) -> usize

pub mod butteraugli::precompute
pub struct butteraugli::precompute::ButteraugliReference
impl butteraugli::precompute::ButteraugliReference

pub fn butteraugli::precompute::ButteraugliReference::compare_linear(&self, &[f32]) -> core::result::Result<butteraugli::ButteraugliResult, butteraugli::ButteraugliError>

pub fn butteraugli::precompute::ButteraugliReference::height(&self) -> usize

pub fn butteraugli::precompute::ButteraugliReference::new_linear_planar(&[f32], &[f32], &[f32], usize, usize, usize, butteraugli::ButteraugliParams) -> core::result::Result<Self, butteraugli::ButteraugliError>

#[non_exhaustive] pub struct butteraugli::ButteraugliResult

pub butteraugli::ButteraugliResult::pnorm_3: f64
pub butteraugli::ButteraugliResult::score: f64

pub fn butteraugli::ButteraugliResult::clone(&self) -> butteraugli::ButteraugliResult
impl core::fmt::Debug for butteraugli::ButteraugliResult
pub fn butteraugli::ButteraugliResult::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result

impl core::marker::Send for butteraugli::ButteraugliResult
impl core::marker::Sync for butteraugli::ButteraugliResult
impl core::marker::Unpin for butteraugli::ButteraugliResult
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for butteraugli::ButteraugliResult

impl core::clone::Clone for butteraugli::ButteraugliStripConfig
pub fn butteraugli::ButteraugliStripConfig::clone(&self) -> butteraugli::ButteraugliStripConfig
impl core::default::Default for butteraugli::ButteraugliStripConfig
pub fn butteraugli::ButteraugliStripConfig::default() -> Self
impl core::fmt::Debug for butteraugli::ButteraugliStripConfig
pub fn butteraugli::ButteraugliStripConfig::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::marker::Copy for butteraugli::ButteraugliStripConfig
impl core::marker::Freeze for butteraugli::ButteraugliStripConfig
impl core::marker::Send for butteraugli::ButteraugliStripConfig
impl core::marker::Sync for butteraugli::ButteraugliStripConfig
impl core::marker::Unpin for butteraugli::ButteraugliStripConfig
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for butteraugli::ButteraugliStripConfig
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for butteraugli::ButteraugliStripConfig
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for butteraugli::ButteraugliStripConfig
pub const butteraugli::BUTTERAUGLI_BAD: f64
pub const butteraugli::BUTTERAUGLI_GOOD: f64
pub const butteraugli::HALO_ROWS_DEFAULT: usize
pub const butteraugli::MIN_STRIP_HEIGHT: usize
pub fn butteraugli::butteraugli(imgref::ImgRef<'_, rgb::RGB8>, imgref::ImgRef<'_, rgb::RGB8>, &butteraugli::ButteraugliParams) -> core::result::Result<butteraugli::ButteraugliResult, butteraugli::ButteraugliError>
pub fn butteraugli::butteraugli_linear(imgref::ImgRef<'_, rgb::formats::rgb::Rgb<f32>>, imgref::ImgRef<'_, rgb::formats::rgb::Rgb<f32>>, &butteraugli::ButteraugliParams) -> core::result::Result<butteraugli::ButteraugliResult, butteraugli::ButteraugliError>
pub fn butteraugli::butteraugli_linear_strip(imgref::ImgRef<'_, rgb::formats::rgb::Rgb<f32>>, imgref::ImgRef<'_, rgb::formats::rgb::Rgb<f32>>, &butteraugli::ButteraugliParams, u32) -> core::result::Result<butteraugli::ButteraugliResult, butteraugli::ButteraugliError>
pub fn butteraugli::butteraugli_linear_strip_with_config(imgref::ImgRef<'_, rgb::formats::rgb::Rgb<f32>>, imgref::ImgRef<'_, rgb::formats::rgb::Rgb<f32>>, &butteraugli::ButteraugliParams, u32, butteraugli::ButteraugliStripConfig) -> core::result::Result<butteraugli::ButteraugliResult, butteraugli::ButteraugliError>
pub fn butteraugli::butteraugli_strip(imgref::ImgRef<'_, rgb::RGB8>, imgref::ImgRef<'_, rgb::RGB8>, &butteraugli::ButteraugliParams, u32) -> core::result::Result<butteraugli::ButteraugliResult, butteraugli::ButteraugliError>
pub fn butteraugli::butteraugli_strip_with_config(imgref::ImgRef<'_, rgb::RGB8>, imgref::ImgRef<'_, rgb::RGB8>, &butteraugli::ButteraugliParams, u32, butteraugli::ButteraugliStripConfig) -> core::result::Result<butteraugli::ButteraugliResult, butteraugli::ButteraugliError>
pub fn butteraugli::srgb_to_linear(u8) -> f32
